text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 011

- 02. PLACE: Santo Antonio de Ubintuba – Vigia-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 22 Oct 77- at 20:15h

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow, matte.

- 06. FORM: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 2.5 cm

- 08. MOVEMENT: Slightly curved path, North / South direction

- 09. SPEED: Great speed (supersonic)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 1,200 (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 5,000m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (ES): A2 / ICOMAR team

- 13. NOTE: Absence of noise or air displacement (sonic wave)

- 01. REG. n. 012

- 02. PLACE: Baia do Sol- Mosqueiro-PA

- 03 DATE / TIME: 22 Oct 77 – at
summary: Operação Prato reports 011–020: military team logged 10 luminous-body sightings in Oct–Nov 1977 over Pará; report 017 includes a humanoid emerging from a hatch.
